postText:
I asked ERCOT CEO Pablo Vegas how RTC+B is performing since going live on December 5th.

tl;dr: ERCOT projects more than $3 billion a year in wholesale market savings from real-time co-optimization of energy and ancillary services. They can already see it in the data. https://t.co/z1GkXo4S4n
keyFindings: The image depicts an industry panel discussion, a common format for communicating corporate strategy and market outlooks in the energy sector.
Executive-level participation in public forums highlights the importance of thought leadership and stakeholder engagement within the industry.
